intro: Braya novae-angliae, also known as New England Alpine Cress, is a rare and endangered perennial plant species native to the high-altitude regions of eastern North America. This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory infections.
